TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Chris Alcaide kawas tay 1922, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 10, Chris Alcaide, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2004) qnxan nya Chris Alcaide htagan beh sa Youngstown,Ohio . 1942 kawas Chris Alcaide musa Hollywood.mtzyaw beh Hollywood. te sazing cinbwanan mciriq lga,1943-1946 kawas mhetay pincwagan nya. tmasoq mciriq lga,hiya ga musa Hollywood. 1956 kawas Chris Alcaide ru Tayyibe Perizat Hatman wal kekong la.hiya ga wal t'alax la. suruw lga,Alcaide ru Georgia Holt kekong lozi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ alʦ~ʨai*e kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ alʦ~ʨai*e, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ alʦ~ʨai*e ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa jouŋs~ɕtown,oħio . **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ alʦ~ʨai*e mus~ɕa ħolljwoo*.mtzjaw βeħ ħolljwoo*. te s~ɕaziŋ ʦ~ʨinβwanan mʦ~ʨiriq lɣa,****-**** kawas~ɕ mħetaj pinʦ~ʨwaɣan nja. tmas~ɕoq mʦ~ʨiriq lɣa,ħija ɣa mus~ɕa ħolljwoo*. **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ alʦ~ʨai*e ru tajjiβe perizat ħatman wal kekoŋ la.ħija ɣa wal tʔalax la. s~ɕuruw lɣa,alʦ~ʨai*e ru ɣeorɣia ħolt kekoŋ lozi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: Chris Alcaide kawas tay 1922, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 10, Chris Alcaide, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2004) qnxan nya Chris Alcaide htagan beh sa Youngstown,Ohio . 1942 kawas Chris Alcaide musa Hollywood.mtzyaw beh Hollywood. te sazing cinbwanan mciriq lga,1943-1946 kawas mhetay pincwagan nya. tmasoq mciriq lga,hiya ga musa Hollywood. 1956 kawas Chris Alcaide ru Tayyibe Perizat Hatman wal kekong la.hiya ga wal t'alax la. suruw lga,Alcaide ru Georgia Holt kekong lozi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

(wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ alʦ~ʨai*e ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa jouŋs~ɕtown,oħio . **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ alʦ~ʨai*e mus~ɕa ħolljwoo*.mtzjaw βeħ ħolljwoo*. te s~ɕaziŋ ʦ~ʨinβwanan mʦ~ʨiriq lɣa,****-**** kawas~ɕ mħetaj pinʦ~ʨwaɣan nja. tmas~ɕoq mʦ~ʨiriq lɣa,ħija ɣa mus~ɕa ħolljwoo*. **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ alʦ~ʨai*e ru tajjiβe perizat ħatman wal kekoŋ la.ħija ɣa wal tʔalax la. s~ɕuruw lɣa,alʦ~ʨai*e ru ɣeorɣia ħolt kekoŋ lozi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
